title.text: If my agent appointed above is unable or unwilling to serve as my agent, I appoint the following person(s) to serve as agents in the order set forth below with the authority to make health care decisions on my behalf as provided herein:

options.value: Donate any needed organs or parts
Donate my body for anatomical study
Do not donate organs or body parts

model.text:
I understand that this power of attorney exists indefinitely from the date I execute this document
unless I establish a shorter time or revoke the power of attorney. If I am unable to make health care
decisions for myself when this power of attorney expires, the authority I have granted my agent
continues to exist until the time I become able to make health care decisions for myself.

title.text: This power of attorney ends on the following date (optional):

model.text:
By signing this document, I hereby revoke any and all prior medical powers of attorney that I may
have executed.
